case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ACTING THROUGH I VS. MARKY LYNN QUAYLE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2009 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ACTING THROUGH I TS PORT COMMISSION RECOVER FROM APPELLANT QUAYLE, MARKY LYNN , A SOLE PROPRIETOR, DBA QUAYLE AND COMPANY $343.05 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $403.05, THE COURT FINDS THE TENANCY TERMINATED 11-31-2007. TENANT'S FAILURE TO REMOVE ABANDONED PROPRTY DID NOT CONSITUTE A HOLD-OVER. THE PRINCIPAL REPRESENTS RENT FOR OCT. AND NOV. 2007, $343.05 IN DISPOSAL/CLEAN-UP, LESS TENANT'S $1460.52 SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLTF. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:05am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber, dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Appellant, Marky Lynn Quayle, appears in Pro Per; CCSF acting through its Port Commission, appears in Pro Per through Victoria Gauidia. Parties and witnesses, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Lamont Adams testifies on behalf of the respondent; Leo Quayle testifies briefly on behalf of appellant.
EXHR(A) Two color photos
EXHR(B) Multiple documents including a Multi-Task Work Order
10:50am
Matter is submitted. New evidence is retained.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Continued To Feb-18-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
